description: Determinate progress bar. Radix renders a <div role="progressbar"> with aria-valuemin / aria-valuemax / aria-valuenow reflecting the current value (0–100). The visual bar is a child <div> whose translateX is animated based on value.

announcements: Announces as a progress bar with its current value as a percentage.
screenReader.notes: For long-running operations, screen readers may not re-announce value changes automatically. Consider wrapping the operation's status in an aria-live region that reports milestones ("25% complete", "50% complete").

contrast.text: N/A; progress bar has no text unless the consumer overlays a label
contrast.ui: Fill uses bg-primary, track uses bg-primary/20; meets AA non-text contrast

motion.reducedMotion: The fill uses transition-all. Gate with motion-reduce:transition-none if you need strict reduced-motion compliance; the end value is visible immediately either way.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide an accessible label (aria-label / aria-labelledby) describing what is loading.
For indeterminate progress (unknown duration), pass value={null} to let Radix omit aria-valuenow; consider swapping to a Skeleton or spinner instead.
Don't use Progress as the sole indicator of a time-sensitive action; pair with a text status that updates.
